title: Error: Internal Error: adder_sub_tb1.txt:64:9: ../V3Scope.cpp:72: Can't locate varref scope $monitor

features.name: $monitor with multiple format specifiers and variables
features.description: Code should include a $monitor system task call with multiple format specifiers and variable arguments spanning different scopes
features.snippet: $monitor("Time=%0t rst_n=%b a=%h b=%h doAdd0=%b result=%h overflow=%b", $time, rst_n, a, b, doAdd0, result, overflow);
